response.overview: RATING: R (RESTRICTED)  This film contains stylized animated violence, strong language, blood, and mature thematic content. Viewer discretion is advised.  In a city rotting from the inside out, overrun by crime, corruption, and silence, a new kind of justice emerges from the dark.  Leo Cross was once a man — until death took everything from him. Now immortal and reborn as Night Hunter, he wages a brutal war against a system that failed him, hunting those who thrive in the shadows of the law.  But when a ruthless mercenary known as Crossbane surfaces — a sadistic former black-ops interrogator with no limits and no soul — the city becomes a battlefield for two unstoppable forces. One fights for vengeance. The other, for chaos.  Their collision will leave scars.  This is not justice.  This is retribution in its purest form.
response.tagline: This is not justice. This is retribution in its purest form.
response.title: Night Hunter: Shadows Of Vengeance
